hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python3 -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || echo '[hook] py_compile failed — please fix syntax before continuing'; fi

if [ -d benchmarks/runs ]; then n=$(find benchmarks/runs -name 'meta.json' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[harness] $n bench runs recorded under benchmarks/runs/"; fi; fi
